group_1.textLeft: But, something happened that made me feel@even more strongly about it.
It was quite the journey, but...
*Pant*...*pant*...@Y-yeah, we beat it...!
Mission Clear! True End Unlocked!

group_1.textRight: Our long fourteen-year journey@finally comes to an end...
...It'd be better if someone like@Juri the Great was dead.
...I too have done nothing worthy of forgiveness...

group_1.textLeft: I didn't want to forgive you two either, but...
I can't hate my "Sister" and "Big Sis"
who went this far just to save me.

group_1.textRight: Li'l Sis, hold up...
You figured it out...?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah...@I'm sorry...for being such a pain in the neck...

group_1.textRight: A fourteen year journey, huh...

group_1.textLeft: Well...
In reality, only about an hour had passed...
It felt so short and yet so long...@So long and yet so short...

group_1.textRight: Sounds like it was a strange experience...

group_1.textLeft: It was indeed a strange experience,@and yet, it was valuable too.

group_1.textRight: In those fourteen years, what did you gain,@Miss Kureha?

group_1.textLeft: ...A new relationship, I suppose.

group_1.textRight: ...What do you mean?

group_1.textLeft: There's been changes in the way I interact@with Ao, Juri, Hikaru, and Ranka.
Those fourteen years couldn't rewrite the past, but...
I definitely feel like we've started a new chapter.
This is a step forward, you know...

group_1.textRight: I see...
Oh, by the way, how is Miss Kasane@doing these days?

group_1.textLeft: Right now?
Well...
Okay... Here I go!

group_1.textRight: You've got to be kidding me...@Another full combo on the first try?!

group_1.textLeft: I've been on a roll today~!

group_1.textRight: Even though it's a brand new rhythm@game that just came out yesterday...

group_1.textLeft: At this rate, I feel like I can keep going!

group_1.textRight: H-hey, wait! I'll do it next time!

group_1.textLeft: I really don't mind though~

group_1.textRight: Pay very close attention!
I'll do a full combo on my first try@with a different song than yours!

group_1.textLeft: I can smell the looming scent of failure in the air...

group_1.textRight: Shut up!

group_1.textLeft: ...That's probably what she's up to.

group_1.textRight: Huh...I see.
Sis!

group_1.textLeft: ...Damn, that's right...

group_1.textRight: You're damn right it's right!
You said you were at the park, so I came over!
It's bigger than I thought,@so it took me a while to find you!

group_1.textLeft: I wish you would have texted me.

group_1.textRight: I thought that might disturb you, since you@said you were gonna be interviewed.

group_1.textLeft: Oh, how unusual for you to be so considerate.

group_1.textRight: Hey!

group_1.textLeft: ...Oops...
Ah, sorry, did I interrupt?

group_1.textRight: No, not at all!

group_1.textLeft: I have something urgent I gotta discuss with Sis.
...It's about our members, isn't it?

group_1.textRight: ...Is it alright to talk about it here...?

group_1.textLeft: It's fine.
Things like this should be recorded too.

group_1.textRight: ...What's going on?

group_1.textLeft: Actually...
